Mark Cancian, a senior adviser with the Center for Strategic and International Studies' Defense and Security Department, joins CBS News with more.

dailyNews.description: Cuban leader Miguel Diaz-Canel confirmed Friday that Cuban officials recently held conversations with the President Donald Trump's administration.

dailyNews.description: WTI crude saw its biggest weekly gain since the 1980s last week.

dailyNews.description: The president, calling the heavily bombed enclave “a demolition site,” proposed relocating Palestinians temporarily or long-term, a move rejected by Arab countries since the war began.
